      "question": "In a randomized block design, what is the primary purpose of blocking?",

        "A) To increase the precision of the experimental estimates",
        "B) To reduce the effect of extraneous variables",
        "C) To increase the sample size of the experiment",
        "D) To reduce the number of replicates"
